member.summary: top level object defining single application instance [MIGRATION-NOTE: during migration we added '__' suffix to avoid ambiguity]

member.name: T:nxm.system.has.application.application__.file_system_path_provider__
member.summary: file system path provider for applications

member.name: M:nxm.system.has.application.application__.file_system_path_provider__.root(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: returns full path to root directory of particular instance

member.name: M:nxm.system.has.application.application__.file_system_path_provider__.root(nxm.system.has.application.iapplication)
member.summary: returns full path to root directory of particular instance

member.name: M:nxm.system.has.application.application__.file_system_path_provider__.temp_root(nxm.system.has.application.iapplication)
member.summary: return full directory path for storing application temporary files

member.name: M:nxm.system.has.application.application__.file_system_path_provider__.log_files_root(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: returns directory where log files for particular app should be stored

member.name: M:nxm.system.has.application.application__.file_system_path_provider__.data_root(nxm.system.has.application.iapplication)
member.summary: return full directory path for storing application data (root of data dirs)

member.name: M:nxm.system.has.application.application__.file_system_path_provider__.assets_root(nxm.system.has.application.iapplication)
member.summary: return full directory path for storing application invariant assets

member.name: M:nxm.system.has.application.application__.file_system_path_provider__.settings_file_name(System.Boolean)
member.summary: returns name of application instance setting file (without path)

member.name: M:nxm.system.has.application.application__.file_system_path_provider__.settings_file_path(System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: returns full path of application instance setting file

member.summary: note: refHost - reference is purposed to be owned by us (no need to acquire)

member.name: M:nxm.system.has.application.application__.get_component_host``1(System.String)
member.summary: returns component's host object, providing environment and services for component must be cared (disposed) by component

member.name: M:nxm.system.has.application.application__.is_private(System.String)
member.summary: is this 'private' application, not published in catalogue, existing only in memory ?

member.summary: group misc. application provided services in single place [MIGRATION-NOTE: during migration we added '__' suffix to avoid ambiguity]

member.summary: returns application this services are configure for

member.summary: creates text log storage in standard application log location

member.summary: application interface for usage in application-code

member.summary:
defines application module behaviour
[MIGRATION-NOTE: this class is in migration progress]

member.name: M:nxm.system.has.application.application_module__.load_settings_from_storage(nxm.system.has.application.application__)
member.summary: load module settings from separate settings storage basic implementation loads from local XML file

member.summary: save settings to separate settings storage basic implementation stores in local XML file

member.summary: returns true only for setting-access-request it can handle

member.summary: translates setting path to module related data-modifier path

member.name: T:nxm.system.has.nxm_has_error
member.summary: error codes defined in this assembly

member.name: F:nxm.system.has.nxm_has_error.ERROR_HOST_IS_STOPPING
member.summary: refuse to perform operation, because host is stopping

member.name: F:nxm.system.has.nxm_has_error.ERROR_APP_IS_STOPPING
member.summary: refuse to perform operation, because application is stopping

member.name: F:nxm.system.has.nxm_has_error.ERROR_SESSION_IS_STOPPING
member.summary: refuse to perform operation, because session is stopping

member.name: F:nxm.system.has.nxm_has_error.ERROR_APP_SELF_REPAIR_FAILED
member.summary: application self-repair failed. use application only when absolutely necessary

member.summary: directory where host resides (used for host-settings auto-discovery)

member.name: P:nxm.system.has.data.host_settings._aes_key
member.summary: returns key used for encryption (constant value as stopgap)

member.name: T:nxm.system.has.host.host__
member.summary: top level object providing all nxm.system functionality inside OS process [MIGRATION-NOTE: during migration we added '__' suffix to avoid ambiguity]

member.name: T:nxm.system.has.host.host__.file_system_path_provider__
member.summary: file system path provider for hosts

member.name: M:nxm.system.has.host.host__.file_system_path_provider__.root(System.String)
member.summary: returns full path to host-settings directory (root for specific host)

member.summary: returns directory where log files for particular host should be stored

member.name: M:nxm.system.has.host.host__.file_system_path_provider__.temp_root(System.String)
member.summary: temporary files root (managed and cleaned by host)

member.name: M:nxm.system.has.host.host__.file_system_path_provider__.applications_root(System.String)
member.summary: returns full path to root directory of all instances

member.name: M:nxm.system.has.host.host__.file_system_path_provider__.assets_root(System.String)
member.summary: return full directory path for storing host invariant assets

member.name: M:nxm.system.has.host.host__.file_system_path_provider__.settings_file_name(System.Boolean)
member.summary: returns name of application instance setting file (without path)

member.name: M:nxm.system.has.host.host__.file_system_path_provider__.settings_file_path(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: returns full path to host-settings file

member.name: M:nxm.system.has.host.host__.make_signal
member.summary: 'makes' signal to host. Can be called from other thread to signal host to stop waiting (i.e. and exit)

member.name: M:nxm.system.has.host.host__.unmake_signal
member.summary: 'unmakes' signal to host. host will stop at barrier by calling wait-for-signal

member.name: T:nxm.system.has.host.host__.services__
member.summary: group misc. host provided services in single place [MIGRATION-NOTE: during migration we added '__' suffix to avoid ambiguity]

member.summary: initialize services sub-object to be ready for work (mandatory initialization)

member.summary: returns instance of extension service with given ID

member.summary: returns component's host object, providing environment and services for component must be cared (disposed) by component

member.summary: register session in host's index note: index holds reference to session

member.summary: try get session from host's index caller must release returned reference

member.summary: is this 'private' host, existing only in memory ?
